subject: Security info was added
body: The following security info was recently added to your Microsoft account: Phone ending in 44. If this was you, you can safely ignore this email.

subject: [GitHub] Your password was changed
body: The password for your GitHub account was recently changed. If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

subject: Storage summary
body: You are using 12 GB of your 15 GB of Google storage. If you run out of space, you won't be able to send or receive emails in Gmail.

subject: You appeared in 15 searches this week
body: See the companies where people work who viewed your profile this week. Check out your full stats on LinkedIn.

subject: Your Amazon.co.uk order #202-1234567-1234567
body: Hello, thank you for your order. We’ll send a confirmation once your items ship. You can track your order in 'Your Account'.

subject: Your New Release Radar
body: We’ve found some new music we think you'll love. Check out your personalized playlist in the Spotify app.

subject: A Note on Your Recent Steam Purchase
body: Thank you for your recent purchase. Your receipt is below. This email serves as your official proof of purchase.

subject: New events for Manchester Tech Scene
body: There are 3 new events happening this week in your area that match your interests in Javascript and Web Development.

subject: Your Adobe Creative Cloud Invoice
body: Your monthly payment for Creative Cloud has been processed successfully. Your receipt is attached to this email.

subject: Shared 'Project_Files' with you
body: A collaborator has invited you to edit the folder 'Project_Files' on Dropbox. Click the button below to view the shared content.

subject: Your weekly writing update
body: Last week, you were more productive than 85% of Grammarly users! Check out your top grammar mistakes and how to fix them.

subject: Due soon: Final Project Documentation
body: The card 'Final Project Documentation' on the board 'Development Team' is due in 24 hours.

subject: Staff Picks: The future of AI in 2026
body: Our editors have hand-picked these stories for you based on your interest in Machine Learning and Node.js.

subject: Meeting Scheduled: Project Sync
body: A new Zoom meeting has been scheduled for tomorrow at 10:00 AM. Click the link in your calendar to join.

subject: [Jira] Issue Created: BUG-404
body: A new issue has been assigned to you regarding the login page timeout. View the details on your Jira dashboard.

subject: Your membership is up for renewal
body: Your annual Costco membership expires on April 15th. You can renew online or at any warehouse location.

subject: New features are here: Stage Channels
body: Check out our latest update! Stage channels make it easier to manage audio conversations with large groups.

subject: Your trip with Uber on Friday evening
body: Thanks for riding. We hope you enjoyed your trip. Your total was £12.50. Rating your driver helps improve the service.

subject: Trending in r/node
body: Check out the top posts today: 'How to optimize SQLite for high traffic' and 'My first Express app'.

subject: New login to Dev-Team Slack workspace
body: A new login was detected on a Windows 11 device. If this was you, no action is needed.

subject: Your iCloud storage is full
body: You have used all of your 5 GB of free iCloud storage. Your photos and documents will no longer sync across devices.

subject: Don't lose your 50-day streak!
body: It only takes 5 minutes to keep your Spanish streak alive. Hop on the app and finish one lesson before midnight!

subject: Your website is live!
body: Congratulations! Your new website is now published and accessible to the public. View it at your custom URL.

subject: Your order from Five Guys
body: The rider is on their way with your food! You can track their progress live in the Deliveroo app.

subject: Course Recommendation: Advanced SQL
body: Based on your recent completion of 'Intro to Databases', we think you'll find this Advanced SQL course valuable.

subject: Pipeline succeeded: main branch
body: The build for the 'learn2detect' repository was successful. All 15 automated tests passed.

subject: Your money is on its way
body: We have received your GBP to EUR transfer. The funds should arrive in the recipient's account within 4 hours.

subject: Your tickets for Tech Hackathon 2026
body: Your order is confirmed. You can find your digital tickets in the Eventbrite app or print the PDF attached to this email.

subject: New matches for your saved search
body: We found 5 new cars matching your search for 'Electric Hatchback' within 20 miles of your location.

subject: Learn to use CSS Grid in 10 minutes
body: This week's top tutorial covers everything you need to know about CSS Grid. Happy coding!
